response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals with proven expertise in distributed systems and technical leadership, they fall significantly short on critical minimum qualifications. With only ~1 year of C++ experience against the required 8 years, and no background in cloud compute platform architecture or hardware/compute infrastructure, the fundamental skills gap makes them unsuitable for a mid-senior technical lead role in this domain.
strengths: Proven distributed systems expertise handling millions of requests per second with high-performance, low-latency systems at Dunnhumby
Strong testing and quality culture with demonstrated TDD practices and multiple shipped products across 15+ years
Clear technical leadership track record through mentoring, open-source platforms, and training workshops
concerns: Critical gap in C++ experience: ~1 year vs. 8-year minimum requirement, essential for this role's core work
No background in cloud compute platform architecture, cloud infrastructure, or compute-specific technologies; expertise is primarily web and services
Lacks experience with hardware architecture, networking, or infrastructure systems fundamentals needed for internal platform work
